steps.title: Identify the conflict
steps.content: The underlined sentence contrasts two things: studies have found negligible electoral effects from austerity, yet some recent European governments suffered electorally because of austerity programs.

steps.title: Connect to the explanation
steps.content: The rest of the text explains the conflict through a complicating factor in the data: governments often time austerity measures to avoid electoral costs, obscuring the risks. A, C, and D misstate the source of the explanation. The answer is B.
